mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM posts WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND status = 'ACTIVE' AND deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT c.comment_id, c.post_id, c.user_id, u.nickname, c.content, c.status, c.created_at, c.updated_at, c.deleted_at FROM comments c JOIN users u ON c.user_id = u.user_id WHERE c.post_id = #{postId} AND c.status = 'ACTIVE' AND c.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY c.comment_id ASC

SELECT c.comment_id, c.post_id, c.user_id, u.nickname, c.content, c.status, c.created_at, c.updated_at, c.deleted_at FROM comments c JOIN users u ON c.user_id = u.user_id WHERE c.comment_id = #{commentId} AND c.status = 'ACTIVE' AND c.deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO comments ( post_id, user_id, content, status, created_at ) VALUES ( #{postId}, #{userId}, #{request.content}, 'ACTIVE', SYSTIMESTAMP )
mapper.update: UPDATE comments SET content = #{request.content}, updated_at = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE comment_id = #{commentId} AND user_id = #{userId} AND status = 'ACTIVE' AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE comments SET status = 'DELETED', deleted_at = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE comment_id = #{commentId} AND user_id = #{userId} AND status = 'ACTIVE' AND deleted_at IS NULL
